title: Hide Chat Popup and Chat Bars
description: A resource pack that removes the insecure chat popup upon joining a server and the chat bars that appear on the left side of chat.
body:
# Hide Chat Popup and Chat Bars

A resource pack that removes the insecure chat popup that appears upon joining a server and the chat bars that appear on the left side of the chat window.

***Note:** This will cause the narrator popup to show with no background.*
